chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1519 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6331/2022 (C/A) 30.01.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Muhammad Arif Korai (Chairman) and Nisar Ahmed Odho (Secretary), Market Committee Pano Aqil..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Two original cheques bearing No.1948939121 and 194893912 amounting to Rs.1,50,000/- and Rs.68,080/- towards petitioner’s arrears and monthly pension for the month of January 2024, respectively, have been given to Counsel for the petitioner under acknowledgment on statement of alleged contemnors No.4 and 5 filed today. Further, the alleged contemnors, present in Court, undertake to clear off all the dues of petitioner by paying him Rs.1,50,000/- per month along with monthly pension. Counsel for petitioner is satisfied, and this contempt application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
